name: OneMain Financial
description_short: OneMain Financial offers personal loans from $1,500–$30,000 with fixed rates (11.99%–35.99% APR) and 24–60 month terms, with same-day funding available at 500+ branches including Miami.
description_long:
OneMain Financial has operated for over 100 years and operates as a nationwide personal loan lender with a physical branch network, including the W Flagler St location in Miami, FL. The company specializes in unsecured and secured personal loans for a variety of purposes including debt consolidation, medical bills, emergency expenses, home improvement, and auto-related needs. They emphasize accessibility through multiple application channels—online, by phone, or in-branch—with flexible scheduling including after-hours appointments. OneMain's lending model targets consumers across the credit spectrum, offering fixed-rate loans with no prepayment penalties and the ability to receive funds in as little as one hour after closing via their SpeedFunds program using an eligible debit card. The Miami branch operates Monday–Friday with extended hours and provides one-on-one assistance from loan specialists. Their loan products come with fixed monthly payments and transparent terms, designed to simplify budgeting. The company requires standard documentation (proof of identity, residence, and income) before closing and offers prequalification that does not affect credit score. A significant limitation is that their APR range (11.99%–35.99%) positions them in the higher-cost lending market, meaning rates can be substantially higher than traditional banks, especially for applicants with lower credit scores or those seeking secured loans.

As a financial institution, this lender competes with both traditional banks and newer fintech personal loan lenders in the consumer lending space. Borrowers seeking personal loans for bad credit may find more flexible terms through online lenders, while those focused on simplifying payments may benefit from debt consolidation loans with fixed rates. For credit building, secured credit cards and credit builder loans offer structured paths to improvement. Credit monitoring services provide ongoing visibility into credit health, and credit counseling through nonprofit agencies can help consumers create sustainable budgeting plans. Many of these lenders offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments over 12 to 60 months, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
address: 1736 W Uintah St, Colorado Springs, CO 80904

company_info.headquarters: 1736 W Uintah St, Colorado Springs, CO 80904

pros: Same-day or next-day funding available (within 1 hour after closing with SpeedFunds)
Fixed rates and fixed monthly payments with no prepayment penalties
Wide loan amount range ($1,500–$30,000) with flexible terms (24–60 months)
Multiple application methods: online, phone, or in-branch at 500+ locations
Prequalification available without affecting credit score
Extended hours and after-hours appointments available at physical branches
No surprise fees or variable payments—transparent fixed-rate terms
cons: APR range (11.99%–35.99%) is significantly higher than traditional banks, especially for lower-credit borrowers
Minimum loan amount of $1,500 may not suit consumers needing smaller emergency funds
Secured loan requirement may necessitate collateral, limiting accessibility for some applicants
Limited transparency on approval criteria and exact rate determination on website
In-branch application requires travel or phone/online access during business hours for specialist consultation
best_for: Borrowers with fair-to-poor credit seeking larger personal loans ($5K–$30K) for consolidation or emergencies
Consumers needing same-day or rapid funding who prioritize speed over lowest possible rates
Debt consolidation seekers wanting fixed payments and no prepayment penalties
Applicants preferring in-person loan guidance and local branch accessibility
diagnosis: OneMain Financial is best for borrowers with fair-to-poor credit who need $1,500–$30,000 and prioritize speed (same-day funding) and fixed terms over finding the lowest possible APR. The main caveat is that rates range 11.99%–35.99%, making this a higher-cost lending option suitable for consolidation or emergencies rather than general borrowing when better rates are available elsewhere.
services: In-branch loan closing and consultation with specialists
